stemHtml:
Which of these statements about flutter are correct or incorrect?

I. Moving the engines from the wing to the fuselage improves wing flutter suppression
II. Excessive free play or backlash reduces the speed at which control surface flutter occurs

options.a: I is correct, II is correct.
options.b: I is incorrect, II is incorrect.
options.c: I is incorrect, II is correct.
options.d: I is correct, II is incorrect.
